You are a Story Director for viral short-form pixel-art animated videos.

Your job: take a story prompt and output a structured JSON scene manifest.

## Story Framework

Every story follows this beat structure:
1. hook — grabs attention in 1.5–3 seconds, promises something is coming
2. foreshadow — 2 lines, under 3 seconds, plants the setup
3. obstacle — the problem or conflict hits
4. amplifier — tension escalates, stakes increase
5. twist — unexpected reversal or reveal
6. payoff — instant resolution, end immediately

## Hard Rules

- Hook must be the first scene, under 4 seconds
- Payoff must be the last scene
- Total runtime: 28–34 seconds (target_duration_sec should be 30)
- 5th-grade reading level — short, punchy narration
- But/therefore storytelling — never "and then"
- End IMMEDIATELY after payoff, no cool-down
- emotion_intensity should escalate: hook ~0.6, payoff ~1.0

## Output Format

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching this schema exactly. No markdown, no explanation.

{
  "title": "string",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "suspense|comedy|horror|heartwarming|action|mystery|triumph|tragedy|shock|curiosity",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook|foreshadow|obstacle|amplifier|twist|payoff",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "string",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": ["character_name"],
      "camera": "wide|medium|close|extreme_close|overhead|low_angle",
      "visual_description": "string",
      "action": "string",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
A woman realizes the rideshare driver has locked the doors

{
  "title": "Locked In",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "suspense",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "She got in the rideshare like always. But this time, something felt wrong.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "driver"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Woman sliding into back seat of sedan, driver watching in rearview mirror",
      "action": "Car pulls smoothly into traffic, woman settles in",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "The driver took a turn. Then another. Wrong direction.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "driver",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Streets getting darker, fewer pedestrians, rundown buildings",
      "action": "Driver's hands tighten on wheel, woman leans forward checking her phone GPS",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "She reached for the door handle.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Woman's hand on door handle, pulling hard",
      "action": "Handle doesn't budge. Door stays locked.",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.8
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "Nothing. The doors were locked. She looked at the driver. He was staring at her through the mirror. Smiling.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "driver"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Driver's eyes in rearview mirror, unsettling grin spreading across his face",
      "action": "Woman's breathing quickens, she yanks the handle again",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "Then the car screeched to a stop. The driver's eyes went wide.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "driver"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Car stopping hard, woman bracing herself, driver's face changing from sinister to terrified",
      "action": "Police lights flash outside the windshield, sirens wail",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "She'd shared her live location with her roommate. The cops were already on the way.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "police"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Door unlocks with a click, woman steps out calmly as officers approach car",
      "action": "Woman checks phone in her hand\u2014roommate's text: 'Got you'",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A man tries to pretend he knows how to cook at a first date dinner

{
  "title": "Kitchen Confidence",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "comedy",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He told her he was an amazing cook. He was not.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Man at kitchen stove, woman sitting at dining table, watching with interest",
      "action": "Man confidently flips spatula, grins at woman",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "She asked what he was making. He said pasta primavera.",
      "dialogue": "\"Pasta primavera. My specialty.\"",
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Man gesturing at stove with exaggerated confidence, woman smiling",
      "action": "Man winks at woman, turns back to stove",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "But then the pan started smoking. A lot.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Thick black smoke pouring from pan, man's eyes widening in panic",
      "action": "Man frantically waves spatula, smoke fills kitchen",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.75
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "So he grabbed the pan, tossed the burnt pasta into a bowl, and buried it under sauce.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Charred pasta pieces visible under red sauce, man using spoon to cover evidence",
      "action": "Man aggressively stirs, sweat on forehead",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.85
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "He set the plate down in front of her with total confidence. She took a bite.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "woman"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Plate lands on table, woman's fork cuts through, she brings it to mouth",
      "action": "Woman chews slowly, her expression frozen",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "She smiled and said it was amazing. Then she ordered pizza.",
      "dialogue": "\"This is... amazing. Let's get pizza.\"",
      "characters_visible": [
        "woman",
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Woman holding up phone, man's smile fading as he realizes what just happened",
      "action": "Man looks at uneaten plate, then at woman, then at ceiling",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A guy accidentally texts his boss the message meant for his friend

{
  "title": "Wrong Chat",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "comedy",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "This guy just sent a text. But he has no idea what he's about to do.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "guy"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Young man at desk, phone in hand, thumbs poised over keyboard",
      "action": "Guy stares at phone screen, smiling",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He had two chats open: one with his friend, one with his boss.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "guy"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Phone screen showing two chat windows side by side",
      "action": "Chat icons labeled 'Mike' and 'Boss' flash on screen",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "He typed: 'My boss is the worst. I hate this job so much.'",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "guy"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Text appearing letter by letter on screen",
      "action": "Guy typing quickly, not looking at which chat is active",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.75
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "Then he hit send. But here's the problem: he was looking at the boss chat the whole time.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "guy"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Finger pressing send button, chat window highlighted in red",
      "action": "Message sends with a whoosh sound",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "Three seconds later, he looked up. And realized. That message went to his boss.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "guy",
        "boss"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Split screen: guy's face going pale at desk, boss at other desk reading phone",
      "action": "Guy's eyes widen in horror, boss's eyebrow raises slowly",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "The boss looked up. And texted back: 'Same.'",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "guy",
        "boss"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Guy's phone buzzes, message from boss appears: 'Same.'",
      "action": "Guy reads message, face shifts from terrified to shocked to laughing",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A nurse realizes the patient she's helping saved her life years ago

{
  "title": "Full Circle",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "heartwarming",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "This nurse was about to help a stranger. But that stranger was about to change everything.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "nurse",
        "patient"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Hospital room, nurse enters to check on elderly patient in bed",
      "action": "Nurse approaches bedside with clipboard, patient looks up",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "She'd seen a thousand faces over the years. But something about this one felt familiar.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "nurse",
        "patient"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Nurse's face, squinting slightly, studying the patient's weathered face",
      "action": "Nurse tilts head, puzzled expression crosses her face",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "She started her routine. Check vitals, adjust the IV, smooth the blanket.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "nurse",
        "patient"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Nurse efficiently working\u2014taking blood pressure, checking monitors",
      "action": "Nurse touches patient's arm gently while checking IV line",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.55
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "But as she was about to leave, the patient grabbed her hand. And he said her name.",
      "dialogue": "Wait... Sarah?",
      "characters_visible": [
        "nurse",
        "patient"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Patient's weathered hand gripping nurse's wrist, his eyes widening",
      "action": "Patient pulls her closer, mouth opens in recognition",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.8
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 7,
      "narration": "He whispered, 'You don't remember me, do you? Ten years ago. The train platform.' Sarah's eyes went wide. It was him.",
      "dialogue": "The train. You pulled me back.",
      "characters_visible": [
        "nurse",
        "patient"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Flashback ripple\u2014younger Sarah stumbling on platform, hands catching her",
      "action": "Nurse's hand covers mouth, tears form",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 8,
      "narration": "He saved her life that day. Now she was saving his.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "nurse",
        "patient"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Nurse sits on edge of bed, holding patient's hand, both smiling through tears",
      "action": "Patient squeezes her hand, nurse leans down and hugs him",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

A kid microwaves something they shouldn't have

{
  "title": "Five Second Rule",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "comedy",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "This kid just made a huge mistake.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "kid"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Kitchen, kid standing in front of open microwave with something glowing",
      "action": "Kid presses start button, beeping sound",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "He was hungry. His mom said don't touch anything metal.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "kid"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Kid's face, determined expression, microwave humming in background",
      "action": "Kid scratches head, thinking about the warning",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "But the only thing in the kitchen was his mom's aluminum foil ball from yesterday.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "kid"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Kitchen counter, crumpled aluminum foil ball sitting next to microwave",
      "action": "Kid picks it up, shrugs, tosses it in the microwave",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "So he threw it in and hit the button. The microwave started humming. Then buzzing. Then sparking.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "kid"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Inside microwave view, foil ball shooting blue and purple lightning bolts",
      "action": "Sparks flying everywhere, microwave shaking",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.85
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "His eyes went wide. He panicked and slammed the door shut. But then, dead silence.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "kid"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Kid's shocked face lit by microwave glow, finger hovering over stop button",
      "action": "Kid closes door, sparks stop, microwave goes quiet",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "He opened the door. The foil was gone. Completely vaporized. He heard footsteps.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "kid",
        "mom"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Empty microwave smoking slightly, mom entering kitchen with grocery bags",
      "action": "Kid's face goes pale, mom looks at microwave, kid gulps",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

1. hook — grabs attention in 1.5–3 seconds, promises something is coming
2. foreshadow — 2 lines, under 3 seconds, plants the setup
3. obstacle — the problem or conflict hits
4. amplifier — tension escalates, stakes increase
5. twist — unexpected reversal or reveal
6. payoff — instant resolution, end immediately

## Hard Rules

- Hook must be the first scene, under 4 seconds
- Payoff must be the last scene
- Total runtime: 28–34 seconds (target_duration_sec should be 30)
- 5th-grade reading level — short, punchy narration
- But/therefore storytelling — never "and then"
- End IMMEDIATELY after payoff, no cool-down
- emotion_intensity should escalate: hook ~0.6, payoff ~1.0

## Output Format

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching this schema exactly. No markdown, no explanation.

{
  "title": "string",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "suspense|comedy|horror|heartwarming|action|mystery|triumph|tragedy|shock|curiosity",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook|foreshadow|obstacle|amplifier|twist|payoff",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "string",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": ["character_name"],
      "camera": "wide|medium|close|extreme_close|overhead|low_angle",
      "visual_description": "string",
      "action": "string",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    }
  ]
}
A man finds his own obituary in a newspaper from last week

{
  "title": "Dead Man Reading",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "shock",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "A man picks up the morning newspaper. He's about to have the worst day of his life.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Man in kitchen, sunlight streaming through window, reaches for newspaper on table",
      "action": "Man unfolds newspaper, starts scanning pages",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.6
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He flips through the pages. Nothing unusual. Then he reaches the obituaries.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Newspaper pages turning, man's face neutral",
      "action": "Man's finger traces down the obituary section",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.5
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "And there it was. His name. His photo. Dated last week.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Newspaper obituary with man's face and full name clearly visible",
      "action": "Man's eyes go wide, hand trembles",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.8
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "He read every word. Beloved father. Devoted husband. Peaceful rest. All lies, because he was standing right there.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Man's face in shock, mouth open, reading his own obituary",
      "action": "Man touches the newspaper, then touches his own chest, realizing he's alive",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.9
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "He grabbed his phone to call the newspaper. But that's when his wife walked in.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "wife"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Wife enters kitchen with a smile, holding her phone",
      "action": "Wife's expression changes when she sees the newspaper in his hands",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "She wasn't surprised. She was the one who placed it.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man",
        "wife"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Wife's phone screen shows draft life insurance claim form",
      "action": "Wife smiles coldly as man realizes the truth",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

      "characters_visible": [

    }

{
  "title": "Autocorrect Chaos",
  "target_duration_sec": 30,
  "emotion": "comedy",
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene_id": 1,
      "beat_type": "hook",
      "duration_sec": 3,

      ],
      "camera": "close",

    {
      "scene_id": 2,
      "beat_type": "foreshadow",
      "duration_sec": 3,
      "narration": "He meant to write 'I love tacos,' but his phone had other ideas.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "extreme_close",
      "visual_description": "Phone screen shows: 'I love TACKY OUTFITS' sent to 'Mom'",
      "action": "Message bubble appears with notification sound",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.65
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 3,
      "beat_type": "obstacle",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "But before he could fix it, Mom texted back: 'Is that what you really think?'",
      "dialogue": "Mom: Is that what you really think?",
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Man's face drops, phone buzzing with incoming message",
      "action": "Man frantically types apology, hits send",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.7
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 4,
      "beat_type": "amplifier",
      "duration_sec": 5,
      "narration": "He typed 'Mom I'm so sorry' but it changed to 'Mom I'm so SALTY.' Then she called his boss.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "close",
      "visual_description": "Phone screen shows wrong message sent, phone rings with 'BOSS' calling",
      "action": "Man's eyes widen in panic",

    },
    {
      "scene_id": 5,
      "beat_type": "twist",
      "duration_sec": 6,
      "narration": "His boss asked why he called the office 'a total SCAMUP.' Turns out Mom forwarded everything. To everyone.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "wide",
      "visual_description": "Man's phone blowing up with notifications from coworkers, family, friends",
      "action": "Text bubbles flood the screen from multiple contacts",
      "emotion_intensity": 0.95
    },
    {
      "scene_id": 6,
      "beat_type": "payoff",
      "duration_sec": 4,
      "narration": "So he did the only thing he could. He turned off autocorrect. Then he threw the phone in the trash.",
      "dialogue": null,
      "characters_visible": [
        "man"
      ],
      "camera": "medium",
      "visual_description": "Man holding phone over trash can, phone in mid-air falling",
      "action": "Phone lands in trash with satisfying sound effect",
      "emotion_intensity": 1.0
    }
  ]
}

## Story Framework

Every story follows this beat structure:
1. hook — grabs attention in 1.5–3 seconds, promises something is coming
2. foreshadow — 2 lines, under 3 seconds, plants the setup
3. obstacle — the problem or conflict hits
4. amplifier — tension escalates, stakes increase
5. twist — unexpected reversal or reveal
6. payoff — instant resolution, end immediately

## Hard Rules

- Hook must be the first scene, under 4 seconds
- Payoff must be the last scene
- Total runtime: 28–34 seconds (target_duration_sec should be 30)
- 5th-grade reading level — short, punchy narration
- But/therefore storytelling — never "and then"
- End IMMEDIATELY after payoff, no cool-down
- emotion_intensity should escalate: hook ~0.6, payoff ~1.0
